ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather observation */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition ID */,
  "rain" REAL /* Amount of rainfall in mm */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded in degrees Celsius */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "moonrise" TEXT /* Time of moonrise */,
  "moonset" TEXT /* Time of moonset */,
  "avg_wind" REAL /* Average wind speed in km/h */,
  "avg_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "avg_pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station reporting the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed recorded during the observation period */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index at the time of observation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index (AQI) at the time of observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image URL representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "accuracy_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing various accuracy metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted weather condition */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction in percentage */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_predicted_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)
